notes: Slide-29 rung 2 ablation: predict() returns the train-time global mean pass rate (0.6450659659207623, computed over non-cold-start training rows; cf. artifacts/global_mean_acc.json). Bayes-optimal constant if the leaderboard sample mean matches train. Comparing this to const_0p5 (-0.6931) tells us whether the leaderboard distribution is shifted away from the train mean (in which case const_0p5 would actually win) or matches it (in which case 0.645 is the new floor). Ships only model.py; value is hardcoded for a single-file ZIP.
